summary: A symmetrical defensive structure featuring a central dome-shaped dark roof rising above a rectangular base with horizontal brick and wood striping. The building is elevated on a foundation with white concrete pillars at corners and white fence-like railings. The footprint shows an L-shaped or complex interior layout with a central tower element and offset wings.

shape.overall_form: rectangular base with central dome roof and offset wings
shape.symmetry: bilateral symmetry with central dominant feature

rebuild_hints: Build rectangular base 16×14 blocks with 3-block height
Create horizontal striping pattern: alternating brick and wood rows
Place white concrete pillars at all four corners
Add white fence railings around entire perimeter at ground level
Construct central dome roof using dark blocks (nether_brick or dark_wood) with stepped pyramid shape
Interior layout shows L-shaped or offset wing configuration based on floor plan views
Dome peaks at approximately 12 blocks total height from ground
uncertainties: Exact interior room layout unclear from exterior views alone
Precise roof material (dark_wood vs nether_brick vs dark_oak) cannot be definitively determined
Exact block count for dome construction requires closer inspection
Whether interior is hollow or partially filled
Specific purpose of offset wing extensions
Exact height of foundation platform (appears to be 1-2 blocks)
